label: Scope & Controls
description: Global scope summary with active org, client, and strategy selectors, intervention controls, and terminal link.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary — global in widget-wrapper.tsx line 89, covers all widgets.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: Added Skeleton loading state guarded by ctx.coreLoading.

0.7.note: Control-bar; always renders scope + actions regardless of strategy count; !ctx guard covers context-absent case.

0.8.note: Global WidgetErrorBoundary sufficient; no thrown errors expected from this render path.

0.9.note: Removed dead alias kpiStrategies, replaced with filteredSortedStrategies directly.

1.1.note: Data via useOverviewDataSafe() hook only — no inline fetch or direct import.

1.2.note: Scope reading is in use-overview-page-data.ts which calls useGlobalScope() twice (wsScope + context); overview-data-context.tsx is a pure value container.

1.3.note: Org filter applied in use-overview-page-data.ts filtering strategyPerformance by context.organizationIds.

1.6.note: Empty scope = all data — each filter block guarded by .length > 0 check.

1.7.note: overview-data-context.tsx imports types PnLBreakdown and TimeSeriesPoint from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data — type-only imports; acceptable for now but should migrate to lib/types/ in future pass.

l1.notes: All checks pass. 1.7 is type-only import in context layer (not widget), acceptable.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓, paper ✓ (renders mode badge), batch ✓ (renders asOfDatetime). ScopeSummary receives mode + asOfDatetime props and displays them.

3.2.note: Context (use-overview-page-data.ts) reads wsScope.mode from useGlobalScope(); WebSocket enabled only when mode==='live' (line 143).

3.3.note: Human check: scope-summary has no order entry — InterventionControls are non-submission controls (pause/resume scope). Verify batch disables intervention buttons.

3.4.note: Human check: batch indicator shown via asOfDatetime prop in ScopeSummary.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget reads context.mode; ScopeSummary already renders mode badge. Paper mode would show 'paper' badge — no additional wiring needed at widget layer.

3.6.note: WebSocket in use-overview-page-data.ts line 143 is gated on wsScope.mode === 'live'. No setInterval or direct WebSocket in widget file.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3/3.4 require human browser walkthrough.

4.1.note: No dead buttons: 'Open Trading Terminal' Button navigates via Link href. 'Clear Scope' in ScopeSummary calls setOrganizationIds/setClientIds/setStrategyIds. InterventionControls wired externally.

4.2.note: No href='#' found. /services/trading/terminal route confirmed at app/(platform)/services/trading/terminal/.

4.3.note: Human check: no form fields in this control-bar.

4.4.note: Human check: verify scope clear + terminal link in browser.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in widget render path.

4.7.note: Human check: no tabs or collapsible sections.

4.8.note: Human check: flex-wrap layout at narrow widths.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategies in scope (scope-summary is strategy-agnostic; it selects scope for all strategies). Applicable to all strategy types in lib/strategy-registry.ts.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 8 tests covering scope/intervention stubs, Open Trading Terminal link, loading, scope-filter counts, All/Filtered label switch, null-context fallback. See tests/widgets/overview/scope-summary.test.tsx

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.3.note: 87 lines — well under 500-line limit. No single function > 200 lines.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= in widget file.

7.7.note: No useEffect or useMemo with inline object/array deps in widget file. All stable refs from context.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred (i18n not shipped).

8.3.note: Uses Button, Skeleton, Link from shared primitives. No raw div+tailwind substitutes for interactive elements.

8.4.note: Agent: no without alt, no interactive div without role. Human: keyboard-only + screen-reader walkthrough pending.

8.5.note: Human check: responsive at minW=4 / defaultW=12.

keepSeparate.rationale: Scope selector is a singleton control-bar that governs the entire overview tab. Merging into any data widget would create circular dependency.

relationships.notes: scope-summary drives all other overview widgets via global scope store. It is the master control for the overview tab.

dataContract.notes: WebSocket (ws://localhost:8030/ws) used for real-time PnL updates; scope-summary itself only reads org/client/strategy lists from REST. Scope selection is stored in global-scope-store (Zustand), no backend write.

gaps: No paper mode scope indicator tested in browser
InterventionControls behavior in batch mode not verified
coverage.notes: Scope-summary is strategy- and venue-agnostic; it applies to all asset classes equally.

knownIssues: overview-data-context.tsx imports PnLBreakdown and TimeSeriesPoint types from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data — type-only imports but should migrate to lib/types/ in future pass

findings.description: scope-summary-widget.tsx — no loading skeleton; widget showed blank during coreLoading
findings.fix: Added Skeleton loading state with h-6 placeholders guarded by ctx.coreLoading

findings.description: scope-summary-widget.tsx — dead alias const kpiStrategies = filteredSortedStrategies
findings.fix: Removed alias; filteredSortedStrategies used directly at all three callsites

findings.deferReason: Type-only import; no runtime mock leakage. Requires context layer refactor outside widget scope.

findings.description: scope-summary-widget.tsx — ~3 user-visible strings not wrapped for i18n
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
